glassware.name: Rocks glass
glassware.bestFor: Short, sturdy tumbler for small drinks on standard ice.
glassware.temperatureEffect: Moderate surface area supports aroma; short height suits compact portions.
glassware.dilutionEffect: The glass does not create dilution by itself; its size and ice compatibility influence how fast ice melts.
glassware.aromaEffect: Moderate surface area supports aroma; short height suits compact portions.
glassware.presentationEffect: Short, sturdy tumbler for small drinks on standard ice.
glassware.servingVolumeNote: Use the establishment's approved fill line and recipe; glass capacity is not permission to increase alcohol.

glassware.name: Double rocks glass
glassware.bestFor: Wider rocks glass for large cubes, crushed ice, or longer short drinks.
glassware.temperatureEffect: Large opening increases aroma and accommodates substantial ice.
glassware.dilutionEffect: The glass does not create dilution by itself; its size and ice compatibility influence how fast ice melts.
glassware.aromaEffect: Large opening increases aroma and accommodates substantial ice.
glassware.presentationEffect: Wider rocks glass for large cubes, crushed ice, or longer short drinks.
glassware.servingVolumeNote: Use the establishment's approved fill line and recipe; glass capacity is not permission to increase alcohol.

ice.name: Standard cubes
ice.effect: Balanced chilling and dilution when hard, cold, and abundant.

ice.name: Large cube
ice.bestFor: Spirit-forward drinks in a rocks glass.

ice.name: Crushed ice
ice.effect: Very rapid chilling and ongoing dilution; requires a full crown.

ice.name: Pebble ice
ice.effect: Fast chilling with easy sipping and controlled packing.

ice.name: Ice spear
ice.effect: Low surface area and clean presentation in tall glasses.

ice.name: No ice / up
ice.bestFor: Cocktails chilled during mixing and strained.
ice.effect: Temperature rises after service, so glass chilling and prompt delivery matter.

ice.name: Blended ice
ice.effect: Ice becomes part of final texture and volume; measure it.
